content.en:
"Dark bluestone liquid?"

Ye Tian didn't understand the usefulness of this treasure, so he was a little curious.

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor continued: "The dark bluestone liquid can assist the Yuan Dao to refine the body, and the peak of the six-fold primordial ancestor impacts the half-step seven-fold primordial ancestor, and you only need to use the Yuandao quenching to break the boundary once. But if an ordinary half-step sevenfold ancestor breaks through the boundary three or four times, it will be difficult to continue refining the body. And if you want to become a Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, the minimum requirement is to break the boundary of nine times, and you have to evolve the Natal Yuan Dao Control Technique to the top Yuan Dao Control Technique, so that you are qualified to impact the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm. But the fewer boundaries we break, the lower the success rate, so we all want to break more boundaries. Relying on his own ability, he can't continue to refine at all, he can only rely on external objects, and the effect of the dark bluestone liquid is very good. Therefore, the value of this treasure is very high, and it is also a treasure that we half-step sevenfold ancestors dream of!"

"The Dark Bluestone Liquid still has such an effect!"

Ye Tian was also a little moved, if he obtained the Dark Bluestone Liquid, wouldn't he be able to break through to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm soon?

After all, he continued to refine his body with the Endless Yuan Dao, and it would take a long time to break the boundary once, but with the Dark Bluestone Liquid, he could reduce this time!

"Let's go, let's go to the Dark Lair now, we can't waste time!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestral Dao.

Airplanes!!!!

A Venerable Dao Ancestor quickly shuttled to the Dark Ancient Lair.

It didn't take long for them to be outside the Dark Lair.

The Dark Lair is huge, far more than the others.

Many Dao Ancestors did not have any fear, and directly broke into the interior of the Dark Ancient Lair.

......

After entering the Dark Ancient Lair, Ye Tian did not feel any suppression, but he sensed the existence of other Dao Ancestors, as well as some primordial antiquities.

The original antiquities here are mainly cyan stones, some are stone spears, some are stone mirrors, and some are stone pillars, which are different shapes, but basically belong to the same category of original antiquities.

"Don't be separated!"

Xuanqing Daozu reminded.

If they are separated, they will be easily attacked one by one, and only by joining forces can they form a powerful combat force.

That's why they joined forces to enter here, if they came in alone, the possibility of falling was too great!

Thundered!!!!

Along the way, they killed the primordial artifacts one by one.

And they also found some resources, and they were all evenly distributed.

"There's a lot of good stuff here!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Last time, he also entered the ancient nest of the Yuan Shen Gu, but there were no treasures there, only the Yuan Shen Drum, but this dark ancient nest is not simple, not only has a large number of primordial antiquities, but also has a lot of resources.

However, this place is too dangerous, and fortunately, after the antiquities turmoil, the number of primordial antiquities here has been greatly reduced, and there is no suppression here, otherwise no one would dare to enter.

Soon, Ye Tian and Xuanqing Dao Ancestor came to the central area of the Dark Ancient Nest, and only here was the Dark Bluestone Liquid.

"The Dark Bluestone Liquid was born from the Dark Bluestone Tree, which is a cyan stone tree, and it is also a primordial artifact, but it can't move, and its defense is very amazing, and it takes several half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors to break it. Our goal is to find the Dark Bluestone Tree, and at the same time to protect the other Dao Ancestors. "

Xuanqing Daozu reminded.

After a while, Ye Tian and the others finally found the Dark Bluestone Tree, but some other Dao Ancestors also found it.

The Dao Ancestor led by the other party is the Mantuo Dao Ancestor, and his strength seems to be more powerful than the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor.

"Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, this dark bluestone stone belongs to us, you can leave!" Mantuo Dao Ancestor said coldly.

There are sixteen Dao Ancestors on the Mantuo Dao Ancestor's side, while there are only thirteen on the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor's side.

Suddenly, Xuanqing Dao Ancestor's face was a little gloomy, and he seemed to have some thoughts of retreating.

At this time, Ye Tian summoned Xuanqing Dao Ancestor: "Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, there is no need to be afraid of the other party, I have now broken through to the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and began to use the Yuan Dao to refine my body, my current strength is much stronger than when I was in the Yuan Shen Drum Ancient Nest." "

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, then we really have a chance to defeat them!"

Xuanqing Daozu said in surprise.

So, he became bold: "Mantuo Daozu, it's you who should go!"

"You're looking for death!"

Mantuo Daozu was furious.

is also a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and he, like Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, comprehends the eightfold Yuan Dao, and he has broken the boundary six times, while the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor has only broken the boundary five times.

His strength is much better than that of Xuanqing Dao Ancestor.

As for the other Dao Ancestors around Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, almost all of them were between the third and fifth boundaries, and the weakest one of them only broke the boundary twice.

And Ye Tian, the sixfold peak ancestor, was directly ignored by him.

"Do it!"

Ye Tian said.

It only takes a show of strength stronger than them for them to retreat.

Xuanqing Daozu nodded and started directly.

This time, Ye Tian faced Mantuo Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian covered his whole body with endless golden light, and he could no longer suppress the opponent in the Endless Black Domain, and punched him over.

Suddenly, the endless golden light tore through everything.

Boom!

The Nest Void shatters!

And the Dao body of the Mantuo Dao Ancestor was all knocked away with a blow, and the flesh was cracked.

At this moment, he was directly stunned!

He couldn't beat Ye Tian, what was the situation?

"Get out!"

Ye Tian used all his strength to exert endless golden light, and all the Dao Ancestors on the other side were swept and blown away by him, although he did not die, but his injuries were not light.

"Let's go!"

Mantuo Dao Ancestor didn't dare to continue to fight with Ye Tian, otherwise these Dao Ancestors would have to fall, and even he might not be able to retreat safely.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, your strength is too strong, this is the Ninefold Yuan Dao!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor exclaimed.

He also had a Dao Ancestor who had comprehended the thirty-six extreme extreme paths in the Tongtian Origin Domain, but when he was in the Tongtian Origin Domain, he did not comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, but only comprehended the prototype of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and left the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary, crossed the Truncated Black Mountain, and has not yet returned.

If the other party hadn't fallen yet, there might be hope to become a sevenfold ancestor now.

Of course, it is also possible to be in the realm of a half-step sevenfold ancestor.

Therefore, he had never seen the Peak Dao Ancestor of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor who had truly comprehended the Sevenfold Yuan Dao, but now he had truly seen it, and his strength was so terrifying!

In fact, the other Dao Ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao at the peak level of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor were not as powerful as Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian's foundation was too powerful, with countless Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and the foundation was too terrifying.

That's why his strength is so terrifying!
